userStories.title: Sign Up for an Account
userStories.iWant: to create an account with my email
userStories.soThat: I can save my work and come back later

userStories.title: Log In Securely
userStories.iWant: to log in with my email and password
userStories.soThat: only I can access my account

userStories.title: Reset a Forgotten Password
userStories.iWant: to reset my password by email
userStories.soThat: I can get back in if I forget it

userStories.title: Edit My Profile
userStories.iWant: to update my name and photo

userStories.title: Search My Saved Items
userStories.iWant: to search through my saved items

userStories.title: Receive Email Notifications
userStories.iWant: to get notified about important updates
